Package io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.processor.paper

Class PaperCommandProcessor

java.lang.Object
javax.annotation.processing.AbstractProcessor
io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.processor.BaseCommandProcessor
io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.processor.paper.PaperCommandProcessor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Processor
@AutoService(javax.annotation.processing.Processor.class) @SupportedAnnotationTypes("io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.annotation.Command") @SupportedSourceVersion(RELEASE_8) public class PaperCommandProcessor extends BaseCommandProcessor

  • Constructor Details

    • PaperCommandProcessor

      public PaperCommandProcessor()

  • Method Details

    • registerTypes

      protected void registerTypes(TypeSupport types)
      Description copied from class: BaseCommandProcessor
      Override this method to register platform-specific types into TypeSupport. Called during BaseCommandProcessor.init(javax.annotation.processing.ProcessingEnvironment) after SPI extensions are loaded.

      Example (Bukkit): 

      
 @Override
 protected void registerTypes(TypeSupport types) {
     types.register(TypeSupport.Entry.builder(playerClass, 1)
         .primitiveDefault("null")
         .literal(d -> CodeBlock.of("null"))
         .platformResolution((spec, p) -> spec.addStatement("$L = getPlayer($L)", p[0], p[1]))
         .platformSuggestions((spec, p) -> spec.addStatement("return suggestPlayers($L)", p[2]))
         .build());
 }
      Overrides:
      registerTypes in class BaseCommandProcessor
      Parameters:
      types - the type support registry to populate

    • getWrapperClassSuffix

      protected String getWrapperClassSuffix()
      Description copied from class: BaseCommandProcessor

      Returns:
